name: Collective Acquisition Corp. II
business: Collective Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on February 9, 2026, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated substantive discussions with any target. It intends to focus its search on businesses impacting national interests of the United States and its allies, including financial, strategic resources, defense technology, or artificial intelligence sectors.
sellsTo: businesses impacting U.S. and allied national interests

exposures.sentence: Although we may pursue an initial business combination in any industry, sector or geographic region, we intend to focus our search initially on businesses that provide products or services impacting the sovereignty, security, self-sufficiency, or other national interests of the United States and/or its allies, including in the financial, strategic resources, defense technology, or artificial intelligence sectors.

USARE is developing a NdFeB magnet manufacturing plant in the United States, and establishing domestic rare earth and critical minerals supply, extraction, and processing capabilities to supply its magnet manufacturing plant and market surplus materials to third-parties.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 18 months from the closing of this offering (as may be extended by shareholder approval to amend our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association to extend the date by which we must consummate our initial business combination) or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.
